prompt: A cinematic crossover promotional poster for a gritty sci-fi military game collaboration, designed like a premium Chinese game event key visual. Vertical composition, ultra-detailed, dark futuristic battlefield city at night with rain, smoke, sparks, neon haze, satellite dishes, towers, launch structures, and a war-torn industrial skyline. Two female combat characters stand back-to-back in the center as the main focus. The left character is a tactical recon operative in a black hooded armored stealth suit with layered plates, straps, gauntlets, and glowing blue tech accents, holding a compact high-tech crossbow pointed downward; her silhouette is sleek, lethal, and military. The right character is a cyberpunk female fighter inspired by a punk marksman archetype, with long electric-blue braided hair, shaved side details, tattoos on her arm, black leather and tactical belts, and a large futuristic minigun-like weapon glowing purple-blue; she feels rebellious, dangerous, and iconic. Their faces are obscured by dark censor-like square blocks, preserving a mysterious meme-poster look. At the very top, small Chinese tagline text reads “两大战场 一种信念”. Dominating the header is enormous distressed metallic Chinese title text reading “三角洲行动 × 英雄联盟”, with the first part in weathered silver and the second part in worn gold. Beneath the headline is a thin line of smaller Chinese slogan text: “战术协同 · 信息制胜 · 突破极限”. On the left midground, include a large luminous blue holographic sign with a geometric logo and the word “HAAVK”. On the right midground, add a purple neon billboard with Chinese text “金克斯·信息位” and smaller subtitle lines beneath it. On the lower left near the left character, add a green-labeled caption box reading “露娜·侦察位”. Across the environment, add red laser streaks in the sky, blue scanning lines, purple atmospheric glow, faint explosions, and dense cinematic volumetric lighting. At the bottom center, place collaboration branding logos and text: “三角洲行动 × 英雄联盟” with English subtitles “DELTA FORCE” and “LEAGUE OF LEGENDS”, followed by the date line “战场集结 6月12日 战场重构”. Beneath that, show exactly 4 small feature badges in a row with icons and bilingual labels: “限定皮肤 / LIMITED SKIN”, “限定任务 / LIMITED MISSIONS”, “专属奖励 / EXCLUSIVE REWARDS”, and “战术协同 / TACTICAL SYNERGY”. Add a final small Chinese footer slogan and tiny copyright text. Overall style: blockbuster game marketing art, hyper-detailed photorealistic concept art, cyberpunk militarism, Tencent-style collaboration poster, dramatic contrast, blue-purple-orange lighting, crisp typography, epic and commercially polished.
